Container.Name: sunny-data
Container.Overview: Sync and browse Comma 4 dashcam recordings. Pulls recordings via rsync/SSH, with a web UI to view recordings, trigger manual syncs, and configure the schedule.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the sunny-data web interface.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Stores config file, SSH key, and last-sync state.

Config.Name: Recordings
Config.Description: Share where recordings are synced to. Must exist on Unraid before starting the container.
